benefits.description: Crazy pumps during workouts, looks fuller

side_effects.description: Water retention in cheek muscles causing muscle fullness, hard to chew due to overbite from fullness

protocol_notes: Can tolerate up to 24 IU HGH daily. Does not titrate, just jumps to dosage and sticks with it. Reports feeling less pronounced effects under 12 IU. Notes that HGH effects water retention and insulin sensitivity, especially at higher doses. Also takes steroids which help with insulin sensitivity and blood sugar levels.
